title: selaginella subalpina
intro: Selaginella subalpina, also known as the moss fern, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella subalpina include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella subalpina is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various health conditions.
